description: Represents an application graph link DNS entry for an application graph node generated from the different logs collected by the app agents.

allow.description: The number of allowed DNS requests to this node.
allow.title: allow

deny.description: The number of denied DNS requests to this node.
deny.title: deny

dns.description: The DNS links from this node to other nodes in the application graph as queried from Loki. This is not populated by default.
dns.title: dns

title: AppGraphLinkDNS
